title: More Stairs Variants
description: Minecraft Mod That Adds 200+ New Stairs
body:
View the whole bio on CurseForge:
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mysticrift-more-stairs-variants
 
 ![stairs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7692bd4695b7b3c9f77ff983833c440abbde340e.png)

More stairs vaiants adds a total of 200+ New stairs to your Minecraft server. These stairs only contain Minecraft vanilla styles. Concrete, Ores, wool, etc!
Don't forget to check out my other mods on my profile!

![stauirs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/04249b75c81cadc3ede2e65ae4479e73ca569307.png)
